# Contributor License Agreement (CLA)

Thank you for your interest in contributing to Insight7 ("This Project"). This Contributor License Agreement ("Agreement") is a legal document that outlines the terms under which you contribute your code, documentation, or other materials ("Contributions") to the project.

By submitting a Pull Request (PR) or other contribution to This Project, you agree to be bound by the terms of this Agreement for that contribution.

## 1. Definitions

*   **"You"** (or **"Your"**) means the individual or legal entity submitting the Contribution.
*   **"Contribution"** means any original work of authorship, including any modifications or additions to an existing work, that is intentionally submitted by You to This Project for inclusion in the work.
*   **"Project"** or **"This Project"** means the `Insight7` project hosted at `https://github.com/PlumBlossomMaid/Insight7`.

## 2. Grant of Copyright License

You hereby grant to the Project maintainers (`PlumBlossomMaid`) and to all recipients of the Project's source code and/or binary form a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license to reproduce, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, sublicense, and distribute Your Contributions and such derivative works.

Simply put: You give us permission to use, modify, and share your code as part of the project under the project's license (Apache 2.0).

## 3. Grant of Patent License

You hereby grant to the Project maintainers and to all recipients of the Project's source code and/or binary form a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable (except as stated in this section) patent license to make, have made, use, offer to sell, sell, import, and otherwise transfer the Contribution.

If any entity institutes patent litigation against You or any other entity (including a cross-claim or counterclaim in a lawsuit) alleging that your Contribution directly or indirectly infringes any patent, then any patent licenses granted to that entity under this Agreement for that Contribution shall terminate as of the date such litigation is filed.

## 4. Ownership and Authority

You represent and warrant that:

*   **Ownership**: You own the copyright in your Contribution or have the legal authority to submit it under the terms of this Agreement.
*   **Originality**: Your Contribution is your original creation. If it includes work created by others, you have obtained the necessary permissions.
*   **No Third-Party Restrictions**: Your Contribution is not subject to any third-party licensing or other restrictions that would conflict with the terms of this Agreement.

## 5. No Obligation

You acknowledge that the Project maintainers are under no obligation to use or incorporate your Contribution into the Project. The decision to accept or reject any Contribution is at the sole discretion of the Project maintainers.

## 6. Disclaimer

TO THE EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, YOUR CONTRIBUTION IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT ANY WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING, WITHOUT LIMITATION, ANY WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF TITLE, NON-INFRINGEMENT, MERCHANTABILITY, OR FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.

## 7. How to Sign

This is a "click-wrap" agreement. By submitting a Pull Request (PR) that includes your Contribution, and then adding a comment to that PR stating:

> **"I have read the CLA Document and I hereby sign the CLA."**

you indicate your acceptance of all the terms and conditions contained in this Agreement.
